D:\vcpkg\downloads\tools\cmake-3.25.1-windows\cmake-3.25.1-windows-i386\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\fuzz_disasm.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\fuzz_disasm.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\fuzz_disasm.dir\objects1
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\fuzz_disasm.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o fuzz_disasm.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libfuzz_disasm.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\fuzz_disasm.dir\linkLibs.rsp
